positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for wrestling_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u25,axiom,
    diamond_mine != imperium).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    roderick_strong != wwe).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~leads(roderick_strong,creed_brothers)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    roderick_strong != creed_brothers).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    diamond_mine != wwe).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    roderick_strong != ivy_nile).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ivy_nile != wwe).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    creed_brothers != wwe).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    diamond_mine != creed_brothers).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    imperium != wwe).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ivy_nile != imperium).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    diamond_mine != ivy_nile).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    creed_brothers != ivy_nile).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    creed_brothers != imperium).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    leads(roderick_strong,diamond_mine)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    diamond_mine != roderick_strong).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    roderick_strong != imperium).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define formed_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define includes(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_feud_with(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
